verdict_summary: All gamma slide-generation entries extracted and sanitized; outline (GenerateOutlineStory SSE 200), deck (GenerateDeckWithLayout SSE 200), and render-generation helpers (SuggestExtraKeywords/GenerateDiagram, 201 JSON envelope) captured token-free.
notes:
Actual HAR counts differ from dispatcher's 6+9 estimate: v2/generation=2 POST + 2 OPTIONS preflight (4 total), v2/render-generation=3 POST + 3 OPTIONS preflight (6 total). All 5 POSTs verified. Generation entries: [0] POST GenerateOutlineStory -> SSE text/event-stream 200 (outline), [2] POST GenerateDeckWithLayout -> SSE 200 (full
...
deck markup, 17.4KB). Render-generation entries: [0] SuggestExtraKeywords -> 201 {"result":"..."} 82B; [2] SuggestExtraKeywords -> 201 82B; [4] GenerateDiagram -> 201 {"result":"{...stringified diagram JSON...}"} 284B. Both POST envelopes use {"result":""} shape for render-generation; v2/generation uses SSE with event:content / id:N / data: framing for streaming text. Sanitization stripped: Authorization, Cookie, Set-Cookie, x-csrf, x-gamma-csrf headers; eyJ-blob base64 contexts in LaunchDarkly URL paths; JWT 3-segments; bearer prefixes. Total output 512KB (well under 1MB budget). Source HAR 156MB / 2702 entries.
